underlying_goal: Investigate and respond to a Jira ticket (ENG-999199) about DLP redaction behavior in the PlainTextExtractor path — specifically how email subject/body and leading-space handling affect redacted output and offset alignment.
friction_detail: Claude initially asserted '1:1, no shift' on the normalizer without reading the code; user pushed back and Claude verified against actual source.
brief_summary: User wanted a thorough analysis to respond to a DLP redaction Jira ticket; Claude traced the code, answered the questions, posted to the ticket, and maintained an analysis doc — goal achieved.
